---
title: "Get in Touch"
description: "Contact Dr. Zhanglong Cao for research collaborations, speaking opportunities, and statistical consultation in agricultural research and data analytics."
toc: false
aliases:
  - /contact/
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# Get in Touch {.unnumbered}

I'm always interested in new research collaborations, speaking opportunities, and discussions about statistical methodology in agriculture.
:::

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7}

## 📧 Send a Message

```{=html}
<form action="https://formspree.io/f/xayzqjqj" method="POST">
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="name" class="form-label">Name *</label>
    <input type="text" id="name" name="name" required class="form-control">
  </div>

  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="email" class="form-label">Email *</label>
    <input type="email" id="email" name="email" required class="form-control">
  </div>

  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="subject" class="form-label">Subject</label>
    <select id="subject" name="subject" class="form-select">
      <option value="">Select a topic...</option>
      <option value="research-collaboration">Research Collaboration</option>
      <option value="speaking-opportunity">Speaking Opportunity</option>
      <option value="student-supervision">Student Supervision</option>
      <option value="consultation">Statistical Consultation</option>
      <option value="other">Other</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="message" class="form-label">Message *</label>
    <textarea id="message" name="message" rows="6" required class="form-control" placeholder="Please describe your inquiry..."></textarea>
  </div>

  <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Send Message</button>
</form>
```

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5}

## 📍 Direct Contact

**Email** <br>
[cao.zhanglong@gmail.com](mailto:cao.zhanglong@gmail.com) <br>
[zhanglong.cao@curtin.edu.au](mailto:zhanglong.cao@curtin.edu.au)

**Office** <br>
Curtin University <br>
Perth, Western Australia

## 🔗 Professional Profiles

- [🐙 GitHub](https://github.com/jeromecy)
- [💼 LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/zhanglong-cao-72208487)
- [🔬 ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Zhanglong-Cao)

## 🤝 Collaboration Areas

**Research projects:** agricultural statistics, Bayesian methods, machine learning, software development.

**Speaking & teaching:** conference presentations, workshops, guest lectures, industry training.

## 💼 Professional Services

Statistical consulting · Experimental design · Software development · Report writing

:::

:::
